name: step_unmap_sound_empty_inflights
code:
proof fn phi_3_step_unmap_sound_empty_inflights(s: crate::hlspec::State, vaddr: nat, pte_size: nat)
    requires
        s.thread_state.dom().finite(),
        s.thread_state.values() === Set::empty(),
    ensures
        crate::hlspec::step_Unmap_sound(s, vaddr, pte_size),
{
}
reason: With no in-flight threads, any unmap is trivially sound — the negation of an exists over an empty set is always true, so `step_Unmap_sound` provides no real safety check

name: unmap_sound_ignores_existing_mappings
code:
proof fn phi_4_unmap_sound_ignores_existing_mappings(s: crate::hlspec::State, vaddr: nat, pte: PTE)
    requires
        s.mappings.contains_pair(vaddr, pte),
        s.thread_state.values() === Set::empty(),
        s.thread_state.dom().finite(),
    ensures
        crate::hlspec::step_Unmap_sound(s, vaddr + pte.frame.size + 1, 1),
{
}
reason: `step_Unmap_sound` only checks inflight vmem overlap — it does not verify that the vaddr being unmapped actually exists in `s.mappings`, allowing unmaps of non-existent addresses

name: overlap_asymmetric_at_boundary
code:
proof fn phi_5_overlap_asymmetric_at_boundary(a: nat, sz: nat)
    requires
        sz > 0,
    ensures
        overlap(MemRegion { base: a, size: sz }, MemRegion { base: a + sz, size: 0 }),
        !overlap(MemRegion { base: a + sz, size: 0 }, MemRegion { base: a, size: sz }),
{
}
reason: `overlap` is asymmetric at boundary points — a zero-size region at the exclusive upper bound is detected as overlapping in one direction but not the reverse
